name: One-eye - Scarred Nanuqsaurus
description:
Your Move.

I decided to make my Nanuqsaurus from Path of Titans into a persona, then this bot. It doesn't have many tokens but please be nice to him as he's my favorite...

I plan on making my other dinos into bots + anthro versions drawn by me!

Make sure to leave feedback in the comments :]
creator: godzilla_but_high
